_description: FrankX curated Suno track inventory — generated from data/music/suno-catalog.json by scripts/music/build-music-inventory.mjs. Do not hand-edit tracks; rerun the builder.

_profileStats.bio: Music to unleash your creative genius 🎼🎶🧠 Connecting visionaries

tracks.title: Starlight Delight (Remastered)

tracks.title: Glass Between Us
genre: euphoric progressive house with female airy vocals; soft sidechained sub and gentle kick pulse under wide supersaws and delicate plucks. verses stay intimate with filtered pads and minimal topline
then a pre-chorus opens the stereo field with layered reverbs and rising filters. chorus hits with big
timeless trance-inspired hooks and stacked harmonies

tracks.title: Neural Frequency
genre: good vibes. haunting synth intro leads into a driving indie pop groove

with tight electronic drums and bass supporting airy pads and interlocking guitar lines. the chorus blooms with layered vocals and bright synth leads. a dynamic bridge strips back to percussion and voice
then swells to a vibrant finale.

tracks.title: 遠くても / Still Right Here

syncopated guitar riff; bass glues everything with warm growl. verses stay gritty and close
vocal right on the edge; chorus opens fast with big open chords

tracks.title: Arcanea Secret

rhodes arpeggios over vinyl crackle and sidechained moog bass; verse opens sparse with dusty keys and vocal chops
pre-chorus lifts with cinematic strings and tape-smeared risers
chorus blooms wide with stacked vocals and a mantra-like hook. close-mic lead with airy doubles

tracks.title: With Gods We Vibe
genre: danceable but floaty. angelic high-register female vocals sit laser-focused in the center
doubled with airy stacks and whispered ad-libs. crisp skittering hats over a tight

tracks.title: Arcanea Is Ours
genre: liquid drum and bass with celestial gloss: rolling breaks under a deep
and bright yet soft piano chords. female vocals chopped and looped into rhythmic mantras about benevolent intelligence

tracks.title: Arcanea, You Make Me Wonder
genre: shimmering electro-pop ballad with female vocals: airy pads and twinkling arps over a pulsing midtempo groove
kick and bass blooming in the chorus. verses stay intimate with soft synth plucks and close-mic vocal; chorus explodes with stacked harmonies
and wide stereo delays. bridge strips to vocal and reverb-drenched keys

tracks.title: Starlight Dynasty
genre: high-octane festival blend: rock power chords and virtuosic lead guitar over a hard-hitting four-on-the-floor foundation that flips into drum & bass drops and trap-inflected 808 runs. female vocals
glide between confident k-pop melodies and rhythmic rap cadences. huge chant-along hook

tracks.title: Vibe Gods of Arcanea
genre: high-energy deep house meets drum and bass groove

male vocals. skittering percussion and subby bass under a shimmering chord bed; electric guitar virtuoso lines trade phrases with sharp synth stabs. verses ride a sophisticated hip hop pocket; chorus explodes with belted topline and stacked harmonies. strings swell in the pre-chorus for drama
drums hit explosively on the drop. arrangement loops hypnotically while dynamics swell and pull back

tracks.title: Feeling Is The Secret

tracks.title: One More Round

dripping swagger and grit. final chorus modulates up with stacked screams and a blazing shred outro.

tracks.title: Hold On To That

tracks.title: Young Again

tracks.title: Jump Jump x Vibe O S (Mashup)

tracks.title: Read It Later
genre: modern alt-dance / ukg-influenced pop; female vocal sample chopped into short

tracks.title: I Want To Build A Free World
genre: hypnotic late-night tech house at 139 bpm: warm sliding bassline

soft-breathy female vocal chops looping elongated vowels as texture; smooth male vocals carry the lead topline. quick riser into a tight drop with evolving filter sweeps and subtle chord stabs that bloom in the chorus. tiktok-friendly structure with early hook

tracks.title: Remember to look up at the stars
genre: melodic progressive house meets euphoric trance. airy

sophisticated female vocals float over warm sidechained pads and a pulsing bass bed. verse 1 keeps it intimate with sparse plucks and subtle arp; first chorus widens into big supersaw leads and crowd-ready drums. a dreamy mid-song break strips to reverb-soaked piano and vocal chops
then an epic festival-style build drops into a soaring final chorus with layered harmonies and wide stereo delays.

tracks.title: Golden Frequencies

pre-chorus opens with rising cymbal haze and doubled vocal lines

tracks.title: Baila en la Playa
genre: pop superstar deep house fused with afrobeats at a mid-tempo bounce; verse rides tight kick

and syncopated log drums; pre-chorus lifts with filtered claps and stacked vocal lifts; chorus opens into a wide four-on-the-floor pulse with sunlit synth chords and a singable topline. female vocals front and center
doubled in choruses with airy ad-libs and short delay throws. ear candy includes wave-swell risers

tracks.title: Cannot Leave Meaning
genre: dark art-rock ballad with slow half-time drums
and a detuned piano figure that circles like a vow; verse stays sparse and close-mic
pre-chorus adds tense harmonies and a rising tom pulse

tracks.title: Space Between Us
genre: melodic house / ambient pop with sophisticated afrobeats pulse at 116 to 139 bpm
minor-key lift into a hopeful chorus; intimate verse rides on soft kick
spacious pads and jazzy sax-piano touches

tracks.title: Порог без замка
genre: art-rock lounge ballad with a dazzling electric guitar intro
brushed drums and round bass; verse rides intimate and smoky
pre-chorus opens with rising guitar lines and stacked harmony

tracks.title: Starlight Manifestation
genre: chillwave meets melodic deep house with a laid-back four-on-the-floor pulse
and shimmering chords; verse rides airy pads and filtered bass
pre-chorus strips to handclaps and a rising arp

tracks.title: Hian’s Amped Lesson
genre: hard rock with a driving mid-tempo stomp and flashy electric guitar runs; verse rides tight palm-muted riffs and punchy drums
pre-chorus opens with rising toms and cleaner chords
chorus slams with stacked shout doubles and gang responses
bridge drops to half-time with a bent-note guitar solo. lead vocal is gritty and close-mic in verses

tracks.title: Salt in My Throat
genre: desert rock ballad with a slow hypnotic bass groove
and reverb-soaked guitar swells; verse stays intimate and low-slung
pre-chorus opens space with held bass notes and rising harmony

tracks.title: Sirens and the Sea
genre: soul-pop rock with unplugged fingerpicked guitar
and slow-building electric riffs over a bass-heavy groove; verse starts intimate and sparse
pre-chorus widens with rising female oohs and distant mhh tones

tracks.title: Drown in Your Light (Ohh Hoo)
genre: emotionally charged production; warm acoustic guitar foundation layered with shimmering electric hooks
and dynamic cinematic drums that rise into big

tracks.title: Rhizlane in Madrid
genre: rock and roll with swaggering mid-tempo drive
biting electric guitar riffs and flashy lead runs; verse rides chunky palm-muted guitars and bass pulse
pre-chorus opens with tom lifts and rising harmony

tracks.title: Through the Light (Arcanea)
genre: liquid drum and bass with a cinematic neoclassical intro
and lush side-chained pads; verse opens sparse with crystalline piano and breathy male vocals

tracks.title: Can I Be Honest
genre: uk tech house and bass house with a bouncy four-on-the-floor kick

tracks.title: Room of Echoes
genre: alt r&b with slow-swung half-time pulse and soft percussive taps; verse stays intimate and close
pre-chorus lifts with filtered vocal chops and reverse swells
chorus opens into wide doubled lines with ping-pong delay tails. breath noises

tracks.title: No Time For Me
genre: rock anthem with punk-metal energy and midtempo lift
driving syncopated drums and a snarling bassline; verse starts on gritty acoustic guitar and tight low toms
pre-chorus opens with rising gang chants
chorus hits with huge electric riff stacks and shouted doubles. male lead vocals move from raspy low register to cracked belts

tracks.title: Maryury Baila
genre: salsa romántica with a bright clave-driven groove
